title: Polyalthia luensis
intro:
There is limited information about the plant Polyalthia luensis available. However, I can provide information about the Polyalthia genus which is a group of flowering plants in the family Annonaceae. 

Polyalthia is a genus of flowering plants known for their unique flowers and medicinal properties. It is reported to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of various diseases.

The bioactive constituents of the Polyalthia genus include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. 

The most common herbal preparations made from the Polyalthia genus include extracts and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
